title: Ericoides stagnale
taxonomy: Ericoides stagnale is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, within the genus Ericoides. It belongs to the tribe Vernonieae. The species is native to South America. Ericoides stagnale is often found in wetland areas, such as marshes and swamps. Its classification helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same family and genus.
